topic: aether - pre-1920 books, papers, and patents

key_docs.title: A Dissertation on the Aether of Sir Isaac Newton
key_docs.author: Bryan Robinson

key_docs.title: An essay towards an explication of the phenomena of electricity, deduced from the aether of Sir Isaac Newton
key_docs.author: Benjamin Wilson, F.R.S.

key_docs.title: A dissertation on the æther of Sir Isaac Newton
key_docs.author: Bryan Robinson, M.D.

key_docs.title: The subtil medium prov'd; or, that wonderful power of nature... which they call'd sometimes æther, but oftener elementary fire, verify'd
key_docs.author: R. Lovett

key_docs.title: Conjectures on the cause of thunder (contains Sir Isaac Newton's æther realized)
key_docs.author: Edward Wright

key_docs.title: Waves and ripples in water, air, and aether
key_docs.author: John Ambrose Fleming

key_docs.title: On An Inversion Of Ideas As To the Structure of the Universe
key_docs.author: Osborne Reynolds

key_docs.title: A New Mechanical Theory of the Æther
key_docs.author: G. H. Bryan

key_docs.title: Baltimore lectures on molecular dynamics and the wave theory of light
key_docs.author: Lord Kelvin (William Thomson)

key_docs.title: A history of the theories of aether and electricity: from the age of Descartes to the close of the 19th century
key_docs.author: E. T. Whittaker

google_patents.note: Only USRE5284E (1873, gas manufacture) — not aether physics. Aether was theoretical, not patented.

canonical_texts.title: A history of the theories of aether and electricity
canonical_texts.author: E. T. Whittaker
canonical_texts.importance: THE canonical reference. Covers Descartes through 19th century.

canonical_texts.title: The Ether of Space
canonical_texts.author: Oliver Lodge
canonical_texts.importance: Last major defense of aether before relativity. Experiments, philosophy.

canonical_texts.title: Baltimore lectures on molecular dynamics and the wave theory of light
canonical_texts.author: Lord Kelvin (William Thomson)

canonical_texts.title: On the Relative Motion of the Earth and the Luminiferous Ether
canonical_texts.author: Michelson & Morley
canonical_texts.importance: The experiment that (supposedly) killed aether. American Journal of Science.

canonical_texts.title: A Dynamical Theory of the Electromagnetic Field / Treatise on Electricity and Magnetism
canonical_texts.author: James Clerk Maxwell
canonical_texts.importance: Maxwell's equations originally formulated WITH aether as implicit medium.

canonical_texts.title: Versuch einer Theorie der electrischen und optischen Erscheinungen in bewegten Körpern / The Theory of Electrons
canonical_texts.author: Hendrik Lorentz
canonical_texts.importance: Lorentz's electron theory retained aether as stationary medium.

canonical_texts.title: The Ether and the Earth's Atmosphere
canonical_texts.author: George FitzGerald
canonical_texts.importance: Proposed length contraction to explain Michelson-Morley null result.

hmc_status.recommendation: Ingest the 8 canonical pre-1920 texts into HMC for proper aether research foundation.
